creator: decke@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is a bug in radicale 3.2.0 and was fixed after the release:

https://github.com/Kozea/Radicale/commit/27e1b04529a9240ea6f45b0ddc9a154dd64b7bc4

Since this is only a optical issue in the webinterface that is uncritical I will just wait for the next radicale release.
